rows.label: tlk45350141_08_msg0001
rows.name:
You've built up the Hræsvelgr
Mercenaries so much at this point,
I can scarcely believe it myself.

rows.label: tlk45350141_08_msg0002
rows.name:
If Vandham were here to see
it, I daresay even he might
shed a tear or two.

rows.label: tlk45350141_08_msg0003
rows.name:
With all the Blades and members
you've assembled, we're a formidable
fighting force to say the least.

rows.label: tlk45350141_08_msg0004
rows.name:
You've organized things so well
that I have little to do lately.
Not that I'm complaining.
